steps.title: Find subject and timeframe
steps.content: The subject is the average processing power, which is singular. The phrase about microchip cores is nonessential. Since then points to a period from the early 2000s to the present, calling for present perfect tense.

steps.title: Match agreement and tense
steps.content: Choice A is singular present perfect. Choice B is plural and disagrees with the subject. Choice C is also plural. Choice D is plural and does not express the since then timeframe as well. The answer is A.
